nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and research tool for scripture and sermon ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole creator of final sermon content
nodes.grounding_span: help me brainstorm funeral services by helping me pick appropriate scriptures and helping me write a sermon

nodes.label: AI as time-saving efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: it helped cut down the time significantly that I would ordinarily spend on research

nodes.label: Personal voice and personalized anecdotes in sermon
nodes.grounding_span: ensure it is in my own voice

nodes.label: AI approximation of personal writing voice
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to capture personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: AI would get better at approximating a person's writing or speaking voice

nodes.label: Personal connection and authenticity in ministry
nodes.grounding_span: the personal touch is so important and this is the skill I focus on maintaining

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it helped cut down the time significantly

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for research and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it helped cut down the time significantly that I would ordinarily spend on research. That was satisfying

nodes.label: Resistance to handing over personal voice to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I would get a basic draft but would highly edit or rewrite sections to ensure it is in my own voice

nodes.label: Cautious anticipation of AI voice approximation
nodes.grounding_span: This may make it tempting to hand over more of the heavy lifting to AI

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with selective integration
nodes.grounding_span: after a two or three iterations I would then take what I have and work with it on my own. I may take snippets of the various iterations I liked best

nodes.label: Boundary setting around personal details and voice
nodes.grounding_span: I may include further details about the person that I did not want to divulge to the AI
